summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PCM Industrial Maintenance Management System after SelectItem bug fixes. Backend APIs remain fully functional (100% success rate). Critical SelectItem component errors have been resolved, enabling full navigation between pages. However, frontend-backend data integration issues prevent proper data display.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not displaying backend data properly - shows 0 service orders when backend has 16
integration_issues.symptoms: Tables show 'Carregando...' or empty state despite backend having data

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard KPIs may not be displaying all values correctly

issues: Logout functionality not clearly visible in UI

passed_tests: Navigation between all pages (SelectItem errors FIXED)
Ordens de Serviço page accessible with New OS dialog
New service order dialog opens and form elements present

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (8/10 major features working - navigation fixed, data loading issues remain)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend-backend data integration issues. Backend APIs return correct data (16 service orders, 6 equipment, 4 preventive plans) but frontend displays empty states or loading indicators. Check API calls in frontend components and ensure proper data fetching and state management. The SelectItem component errors have been successfully resolved.
